---
title: "Jenna Thompson"
name: "Jenna Thompson"
image: "/images/profile_pics/jenna_thompson.jpg"
research: "**Research subject:** Using deep learning to classify of habitat types in rapidly-changing and sparsely-mapped tropical forests"
location: "**Research location:** Wyoming"
dates: "**Dates:** 2021"
category: "Alumni"
category_order: "9"
format:
  html:
    toc: FALSE
---
